source.name: Apple Human Interface Guidelines
source.license_notes: Use as a source link and summarized guidance; do not copy full documentation verbatim.

layout_rules: Use spacing, typography, and alignment to create perceived quality.
Keep controls familiar to the platform when designing native-feeling screens.
accessibility_notes: Respect readable text sizes and contrast.
Design controls with clear hit areas and platform-consistent behavior.
implementation_hints: Use when the user asks for polished, premium, simple, or native-feeling UI.
Prefer fewer elements with stronger hierarchy instead of dense decoration.

quality.notes: Seed record for Apple-style polish; expand by component or platform later.

retrieval.ai_summary: Use Apple HIG-inspired polish for premium native-feeling UI: clarity, hierarchy, restraint, readable typography, generous spacing, and familiar platform controls.
